final:
module RefModule(
    input [4:0] rs1,
    input [4:0] rs2,
    input [4:0] ex_mem_rd,
    input [4:0] mem_wb_rd,
    input ex_mem_regwrite,
    input mem_wb_regwrite,
    output reg [1:0] forwardA,
    output reg [1:0] forwardB
    );always @* begin
    if (ex_mem_regwrite & ex_mem_rd != 5'b0 & ex_mem_rd == rs1) begin
        forwardA <= 2'b10;
    end
    else if (mem_wb_regwrite & mem_wb_rd != 5'b0 & mem_wb_rd == rs1) begin
        forwardA <= 2'b01;
    end
    else begin
        forwardA <= 2'b00;
    end
    if (ex_mem_regwrite & ex_mem_rd != 5'b0 & ex_mem_rd == rs2) begin
        forwardB <= 2'b10;
    end
    else if (mem_wb_regwrite & mem_wb_rd != 5'b0 & mem_wb_rd == rs2) begin
        forwardB <= 2'b01;
    end
    else begin
        forwardB <= 2'b00;
    end
end
endmodule
